Main Cockpit

Quick launch pads for operational systems, docs, and generated workspace navigation.

Primary

QiServer Cockpit

Control plane and Private server cluster management.

QiLife

Personal life organizer and task manager.

QiFinance

QiFinance dashboard and analytics.

QiSpark Docs

Static documentation and blueprints.

QiLabs Tree

Workspace file tree visualization map.

Publishing

QiSaysIt

Public writing, posts, and publishing surface.

QiAlly

Primary QiAlly public/domain hub.

Systems

Cloudflare

Domain DNS, proxy, and edge routing control.

Supabase

Database management and project dashboard.

GitHub

Repositories, actions, and code repositories.
